title: Software Development Engineer - Python
description:
We are Mindsprint!

A leading-edge technology and business services firm that provides impact driven solutions to businesses, enabling them outpace speed of change. For over three decades we have been accelerating technology transformation for the Olam Group and their large base of global clients.

Working with leading technologies and empowered with the freedom to create new solutions and better existing ones, we have been inspiring businesses with pioneering initiatives.

Job Description:

  • Design, develop, test, and deliver application build using Native Python programming
  • Development of all server-side logic, ensuring high performance and responsiveness to requests from the front-end and responsible for integrating user-facing front-end elements into the application
  • Test and debug programs, implement security and data protection attributes, assess, and prioritize feature requests of stakeholders/clients
  • Own parts of the application and continuously improve them in an agile environment
  • Create high quality maintainable products and applications using best engineering practices
  • Coordinate with stakeholders/clients/internal teams to understand user requirements and provide technical solutions
  • Maintain/Improve functionalities of existing Risk Management systems and applications
  • Coordinate with Risk and technology teams to develop / improve strategic risk infrastructure - leading Risk Reporting Office (RRO) development inputs and testing efforts.

Profile Description:

  • Graduate/Postgraduate in Computer Science/Computer Applications/Software Engineering with 4-8 years of experience in Python Development with a focus on Analytics
  • Strong proficiency in Python’s data manipulation libraries, such as Pandas, Numpy etc.
  • Excellent reasoning and ability to understand risk management concepts/methodology/processes to be able to conceptualize and develop prototypes of risk management tools/automation solutions in Python and SQL
  • Excellent understanding of data storage and data management concepts, including databases (e.g., SQL, Postgres)
  • Strong ability to deal with stakeholders across different functions, excellent analytical and numerical skills, good communication and comprehension skills


For more info: https://www.mindsprint.com/ | Follow us in LinkedIn: Mindsprint
